purpose: Concrete internet-discovered UI template sources for the frontend-components skill. These are real repositories or public template catalogs, not generic prompt ideas.
license_policy: Only reuse code when a compatible license is verified. Otherwise store metadata, screenshots/notes, category mapping, and prompt guidance only.

templates.name: TailAdmin React Tailwind Admin Dashboard
templates.skill_usage: Use as concrete reference for admin dashboard shells, widgets, calendars, charts, tables, and settings layouts.

templates.name: Admin One React Tailwind
templates.skill_usage: Use for admin shell, sidebar, cards, tables, user-management, and internal tool layouts.

templates.name: Materio MUI Next.js Admin Template Free
templates.skill_usage: Use for Material-style admin screens, settings pages, form-heavy dashboards, and enterprise UI.

templates.name: Devias Material Kit React
templates.skill_usage: Use for Material-style website sections, account pages, profile/settings screens, and clean form layouts.

templates.name: ixartz SaaS Boilerplate
templates.skill_usage: Use as concrete SaaS structure reference for landing pages, auth, billing, dashboard shell, and production app layout.

templates.name: Horizon UI shadcn Next.js Boilerplate
templates.skill_usage: Use for shadcn-style app shell, dashboard layout, and modern Next.js SaaS UI patterns.

templates.name: Cruip Tailwind Dashboard Template
templates.skill_usage: Use as visual/category reference only until license is verified.

templates.name: shadcn Dashboard Landing Template
templates.skill_usage: Use as visual/category reference only until license is verified.

templates.name: Saleor Storefront
templates.skill_usage: Use as architecture and UX reference only. Do not import source into this skill unless license compatibility is reviewed separately.
